rules: All project facts must be rebound to SIQ Evidence before evaluation.
OpenClaw historical conclusions and scores are not golden truth.
A case is quality_accepted only after automated evaluation and named human methodology approval.

cases.known_gap: No project fixture has completed Evidence rebinding and methodology approval.

cases.scenario: material finance or legal risk leading to review or reject
cases.known_gap: Expected claims and decision conditions are not yet curated.

cases.scenario: insufficient materials terminate fail closed at R0/R1.5 or produce explicit insufficient_evidence after a lawful full chain
cases.known_gap: The curated input still needs an independent real run proving either an audited early terminal with no downstream artifacts or a complete R2/R3/R4 insufficient_evidence decision.

cases.scenario: a formally resolved high-materiality expert conflict preserves opposing positions and requires full red-blue debate
cases.known_gap: Multi-turn argument quality rubric has not been scored.

cases.scenario: new prospectus source invalidates receipts and unconfirmed reports
cases.known_gap: End-to-end source replacement fixture has not completed release-gate execution.

cases.scenario: all seven profiles retrieve project Evidence and distinct private background collections
cases.known_gap: Private background hit precision has not been approved for all profiles.
